cloudfront.responseheaderspolicy.frameop.Docs: The value of the `X-Frame-Options` HTTP response header. Valid values are `DENY` and `SAMEORIGIN`.   For more information about these values, see [X-Frame-Options](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/X-Frame-Options) in the MDN Web Docs.
A Boolean that determines whether CloudFront overrides the `X-Frame-Options` HTTP response header received from the origin with the one specified in this response headers policy.
